RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0026 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Priya Rossi Date of Birth: 02/01/1966 SSN (tokenized): TKN-743624 Annual Income: $147,000 Employer: Initech Loan Amount: $49,000 Term (months): 72 Branch: Austin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN48746AL Hyundai 320i 2025 Hybrid Used 28,000 VIN13434AL Hyundai Sportage 2024 Hybrid Used 51,000 Authorized Signature: Priya Rossi
